briefs.title: Short-Term Rental Registration Rules Clarified for Suites, Seasonal Units, and Multi-Platform Hosts
briefs.summary: BC updated its short-term rental rules to exempt seasonal properties not suitable for year-round living from registration requirements. It also clarified that each suite or secondary unit needs its own registration, but a single unit listed on multiple platforms only needs one registration — and doesn't need a new one if the listing details change.
briefs.action_required: Check if your rental units are registered separately — each suite or secondary unit needs its own registration.

key_dates.label: BC Short-Term Rental Accommodations Regulation amendments take effect
